title: pilosella tardiuscula
intro: Pilosella tardiuscula, also known as Alpine Mouse-ear, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion, due to its content of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. Pilosella tardiuscula is often prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
